Testimonials and Reviews
Not sure where to start?

Brian Doyle and Paul Salewski founded Doyle Salewski Inc. in 1996. We are proud of the fact that many of our employees who joined our firm in the early years are still with us today. We are a team of qualified professionals who work together to provide our clients with the best professional service available.

We are members of the Canadian Association of Insolvency & Restructuring Professionals (CAIRP). All of our Directors are qualified CAIRP Estate Administrators and Counsellors. CAIRP accreditation is available exclusively to Estate Administrators working within member firms.

If you possess, or are seeking, CAIRP accreditation and are looking for a rewarding and fulfilling career opportunity, Doyle Salewski may have an opening for you. Please send your resume to careers@doylesalewski.ca

How We Help You

At Doyle Salewski, we offer a range of services designed to help you navigate financial difficulties and regain control of your finances. Our expert team is here
